query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_departments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  department_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  service_type ENUM('central', 'licensable') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'central',
  category ENUM('compliance', 'creative', 'operational', 'educational', 'health') NOT NULL,
  requires_disclaimer BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  disclaimer_type VARCHAR(50),
  licensing_fee_monthly DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  licensing_fee_annual DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_split_laws DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 60.00,
  revenue_split_house DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_split_trust DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 40.00,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  display_order INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  department_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  service_type ENUM('central', 'licensable') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'central',
  category ENUM('compliance', 'creative', 'operational', 'educational', 'health') NOT NULL,
  requires_disclaimer BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  disclaimer_type VARCHAR(50),
  licensing_fee_monthly DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  licensing_fee_annual DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_split_laws DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 60.00,
  revenue_split_house DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  revenue_split_trust DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 40.00,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  display_order INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
